---
title: "Corrections for Whitlock and Schluter, <em>The Analysis of Biological Data</em>"
author: 

output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      before_body: header_image.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<br>

Below we list corrections for typos in the 3rd edition of *The Analysis of Biological Data*.

***

<br> 

None found yet!
